results.title: Google Ads Expands Alcohol, Gambling & Games Policy
results.description: Google Ads has posted that it has (1) expanded its alcohol policy to expand the approved geographic locations and (2) updated the gambling and games policy to expand the certification requirements to all categories under this policy.

results.title: New GPS tracker for pets allows for two-way voice communication
results.description: Mova’s new SureTrack Pro helps dog and cat owners monitor the whereabouts of their furry companions. Beyond that, the GPS tracker offers additional features, including two-way voice communication.

results.title: Apple Gets Rare Bear Rating as KeyBanc Downgrades on Demand Risk
